meta.content: Oxygen Weather by Susnata Codes - live weather, forecast, profile login, Gmail reminders, and emergency weather alerts.
meta.name: description

body.script:
window.OXYGEN_WEATHER_API_BASE = 'https://susnata-weather-app.onrender.com'; window.OXYGEN_WEATHER_PUBLIC_URL = 'https://oxygen-weather.blogspot.com'; document.getElementById('oxygenWeatherBloggerRoot').innerHTML = `
Susnata Codes
Quick Actions Connect WhatsApp Instagram Susnata Codes

Live Conditions

Oxygen Weather

Live Sync --:-- Sky Ready
O2 Radar Live
Pulse Active
Fetching weather data

Gmail Reminder

Weather Mail Alerts

Urgent only 12:00 AM history No spam

Updated just now

City

Current conditions

--:-- Atmosphere syncing
-- Feels like --

Next Hours

Real-Time Outlook

3-hour live feed

Outlook

5-Day Forecast

OpenWeather

Air Quality

AQI --

Unavailable

© 2026 Susnata Biswas. All rights reserved. Data powered by OpenWeather.
SUSNATA CODES

Oxygen Account

Welcome back

Sign in to keep your profile, Gmail reminders, and weather settings ready.

or
Signed in Oxygen user you@example.com

`;
